final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the logo image (reference #1) to look as if it is written with soy sauce, referencing the soy sauce writing style from reference #2.

风格/媒介: soy sauce as writing medium, liquid brushstroke texture, photorealistic
构图: top-down / overhead view angle
主体: the logo text/mark from reference #1, rendered as if drawn or written with soy sauce
场景/背景: flat surface viewed from directly above
光线/氛围: top-view flat lay lighting consistent with overhead angle
色彩方案: dark brown soy sauce tones
材质/纹理: glossy liquid soy sauce texture, wet pooling edges, as seen in reference #2
文字(原样):
约束:
  preserve the original logo letterforms / shapes from reference #1
  soy sauce writing style must match reference #2
避免: upright or perspective angle; dry or matte texture
